title: A Social History of Music and Games
article_text: This social period is a key part of history. Across the town, people create new types of music. One note from a piano can sound beautiful. A good game can drive a player to think hard. We receive a free policy for further learning. The political moment is important for our class. His eye for detail helps him in development. There is a sale on books about history. She writes a note about her subject. They drive along the road with a happy sound.

sentences.en: This social period is a key part of history.
sentences.zh: 这个社会时期是历史的关键部分。

words.eng_def: relating to people in a group

sentences.en: Across the town, people create new types of music.
sentences.zh: 在整个城镇，人们创造新的音乐类型。

words.eng_def: from one side to the other
a place with many houses and shops
a kind or group of things
sounds that are pleasant to hear

sentences.en: One note from a piano can sound beautiful.
sentences.zh: 钢琴上的一个音符可以听起来很美。

words.eng_def: a single sound in music; a short written message

sentences.en: A good game can drive a player to think hard.
sentences.zh: 一个好游戏可以驱使玩家努力思考。

words.eng_def: an activity for fun or sport
to make someone do something; to control a car

sentences.en: We receive a free policy for further learning.
sentences.zh: 我们收到一项免费政策用于进一步学习。

words.eng_def: a plan or rule by a group

sentences.en: The political moment is important for our class.
sentences.zh: 这个政治时刻对我们的班级很重要。

words.eng_def: a group of students; a group in society

sentences.en: His eye for detail helps him in development.
sentences.zh: 他对细节的眼光帮助他发展。

words.eng_def: the part of the body you see with
the process of growing or improving

sentences.en: There is a sale on books about history.
sentences.zh: 有一场关于历史书籍的促销。

words.eng_def: the act of selling goods; a special offer

sentences.en: She writes a note about her subject.
sentences.zh: 她写了一张关于她学科的笔记。

words.eng_def: a topic or area of study

sentences.en: They drive along the road with a happy sound.
sentences.zh: 他们沿着道路开车，带着快乐的声音。

words.eng_def: from one end to the other of a line

vocabulary.eng_def: relating to people in a group
a length of time

vocabulary.example: A game can drive you to think.

vocabulary.eng_def: from one end to the other of a line

vocabulary.example: There is a new type of game.

vocabulary.eng_def: something you hear; to seem
the part of the body you see with
sounds that are pleasant to hear

relating to government or power
costing no money; not controlled

vocabulary.eng_def: more or additional

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是“一个计划或规则”？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'a plan or rule by a group'?
What is the English word for 'to make something new'?
Which word means 'from one side to the other'?
What is the English word for 'a length of time'?

image_prompts: A group of people in a town square, talking and laughing, with old buildings around them.
A map of a small town with lines going across it, and people making music in different houses.
A close-up of a piano keyboard with one key highlighted, and a musical note floating above it.
A person playing a board game with a thoughtful expression, with a car toy nearby.
A person holding a letter that says 'FREE POLICY' with a smile, and a book about 'FURTHER LEARNING' nearby.
A classroom with students sitting, and a teacher pointing to a sign that says 'POLITICAL MOMENT' on the board.
A person with a magnifying glass looking at a tiny detail, with a graph showing development.
A bookstore with a big sign saying 'SALE - HISTORY BOOKS' and people looking at books.
A student writing in a notebook with a book labeled 'SUBJECT' on the desk.
A car driving on a road next to a river, with birds singing and music notes in the air.
